case_title: WEN JIE TANG VS. MAN YEUNG LAM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,092.85 AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, MAN YEUNG
